Join Our Team

The Ottawa Hospital Foundation (TOHF) serves the Riverside, Civic, and General Campuses of The Ottawa Hospital and the Ottawa Hospital Research Institute (OHRI). Our purpose is to inspire and enable people to support the highest quality patient care at The Ottawa Hospital and lifesaving research at the OHRI.

Facebook
Link opens in a new window

At TOHF, we are proud to have what we believe to be the best, the brightest, and the most dedicated employee team in the entire country! We have worked hard to create a work environment that fosters collaboration, creativity, and work satisfaction for all of our employees.

If your goal is to join a workplace where you can excel at what you do, The Ottawa Hospital Foundation is looking to add you as a member of our very special team.

The Ottawa Hospital Foundation values diversity and embraces an organizational culture that is inclusive and free of bias and discrimination. The Foundation is committed to a board and staff that is comprised of talented and dedicated individuals with a diverse mix of expertise, experience, skills and backgrounds.
